description: Notion documents to keep in sync with code changes. Add new entries here when you create new Notion docs that should be auto-updated on PR merges.

documents.name: PRD
sections: Section 7 'Current MVP Features': Add new subsection (## 7.N Feature Name) with bullet list
Section 9 'Functional Requirements': Add new FR-NNN row to the table

documents.name: TDD
sections: Section 6.1 'Frontend Architecture': Update component table rows if props changed
Section 6.2 'Backend File Structure': Add new files to directory tree
Section 7 'Data Models': Add new model schema subsection (renumber if needed)
Section 8.1 'Endpoint Summary': Add endpoint rows to table
Architecture diagram: Add new collections to mermaid diagram

documents.name: API Reference
sections: Section 5 'Endpoints': Add full endpoint docs (description, auth, request/response, cURL, status codes)
Section 6 'Data Schemas': Add object schema table
Section 7 'Error Reference': Add error message rows + update 404 description
Section 4 'Auth Matrix': Add endpoint auth rows
Update overview text and endpoint count
